title: CHILD WELFARE SERVICES - 211info
text: SALEM CHILD WELFARE OFFICE CHILD WELFARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help in keeping families united. Finds temporary and permanent homes for kids who need them, including foster and adoptive homes. The program also teaches people how to become resource parents. 4600 25th Avenue NE Suite 110 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed on major holidays (503) 378-6800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 378-6800 Abuse Reporting Line (855) 503-7233 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County Services: Adoption Services Family Preservation Programs Foster Home Placement Foster Parent/Family Recruitment Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD ABUSE REPORTING MUTUAL SUPPORT - FOSTER, ADOPT, AND KINSHIP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
